parts.title: Special Education Specialists
prompts: Write a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can adapt a mathematics lesson in [grade 4] for a student with ADHD, and provide 5 concrete strategies to support focus and engagement.
Create a list of 5 adaptations for a student in [grade 7] with autism who struggles with transitions between lessons, and include a task where the specialist writes a transition routine.
Write a 150-word text on how to use visual supports for a student in [grade 1] with language difficulties, and create 5 examples of visual schedules that can be used in the classroom.
Create a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can support a student in Upper Secondary with dyslexia during a national exam in Swedish, and provide 5 tips for reducing stress.
Write a 150-word text on how to adapt group activities for a student in [grade 5] with social anxiety, and create 4 strategies to promote participation without pressure.
Create a list of 5 digital tools that can support a student in [grade 9] with concentration difficulties, and include a task where the specialist writes a plan for implementing one of the tools.

Write a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can support a student in [grade 3] with motor difficulties in writing instruction, and provide 5 adaptations to facilitate the writing process.
Create a 150-word text on how to adapt the reading environment for a student in [grade 6] with visual impairment, and write 4 strategies to make texts more accessible.
Write a list of 5 strategies to support a student in Upper Secondary with hearing loss during oral lessons, and include a task where the specialist writes a plan for implementing the strategies.

Create a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can adapt a PE lesson in [grade 8] for a student with physical disabilities, and provide 5 tips to promote participation. Social and Emotional Skills
Write a 200-word text on how a special education specialist can work with a student in [grade 5] who has difficulty managing conflicts, and create 5 activities to practise conflict resolution.
Create a list of 5 strategies to strengthen the self-esteem of a student in [grade 9] with a low self-image, and include a task where the specialist writes a plan for implementing one strategy.

Write a 150-word plan for how a special education specialist can support a student in [grade 2] with separation anxiety at the start of the school day, and provide 4 tips for creating a sense of security in the classroom.
Create a 200-word text on how to work with a student in Upper Secondary who has difficulty building relationships with classmates, and write 5 activities to promote social interaction.
Write a list of 5 exercises to practise emotion regulation with a student in [grade 6] who displays impulsive behaviour, and include a task where the specialist writes a plan for using one exercise.
Create a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can support a student in [grade 3] who becomes disruptive when frustrated, and provide 5 strategies for managing outbursts.
Write a 150-word text on how to strengthen collaborative skills in a student in [grade 7] with autism, and create 4 activities to practise cooperation in small groups.
Create a list of 5 strategies to help a student in [grade 4] manage transitions between activities, and include a task where the specialist writes a transition routine.

Write a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can work with a student in Upper Secondary who has difficulty expressing emotions, and provide 5 activities to promote emotional awareness.

Create a 150-word text on how to support a student in [grade 1] who has difficulty following social norms, and write 4 strategies to practise social skills in the classroom. Reading and Writing Difficulties
Write a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can support a student in [grade 5] with dyslexia in reading, and create 5 strategies to improve reading fluency and comprehension.
Create a list of 5 digital tools that can help a student in [grade 8] with dysgraphia to write, and include a task where the specialist writes a plan for using one of the tools.
Write a 150-word text on how to use multimodal methods to support a student in [grade 3] with reading and writing difficulties, and create 4 examples of multimodal activities.
Create a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can work with a student in Upper Secondary who has difficulty spelling, and provide 5 strategies to improve spelling ability.
Write a list of 5 methods to practise reading comprehension with a student in [grade 6] with concentration difficulties, and include a task where the specialist writes a lesson plan for one method.
Create a 150-word text on how to support a student in [grade 2] with a slow reading pace, and write 4 strategies to increase reading speed in a safe and supportive way.
Write a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can work with a student in [grade 9] who has difficulty structuring texts, and provide 5 tips to improve the writing process.
Create a list of 5 apps that can support a student in [grade 4] with dyslexia in reading and writing, and include a task where the specialist writes a plan for implementing one app.
Write a 150-word text on how to use read-aloud strategies to support a student in [grade 1] with reading comprehension difficulties, and create 4 strategies to make read-aloud sessions effective.

Create a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can support a student in Upper Secondary with writing difficulties in essay writing, and provide 5 adaptations to facilitate the writing process. Inclusion and Collaboration

Write a 200-word text on how a special education specialist can collaborate with the class teacher to create an inclusive environment for a student in [grade 5] with autism, and create 5 collaboration strategies.

Create a 150-word plan for how a special education specialist can involve parents in supporting a student in [grade 3] with concentration difficulties, and provide 4 tips for effective parent collaboration.
Write a 200-word text on how to create an inclusive break-time environment for a student in [grade 6] with social anxiety, and create 5 strategies to promote a sense of safety during breaks.
Create a list of 5 ways to adapt the classroom environment for a student in [grade 9] with sensory sensitivity, and include a task where the specialist writes a plan for implementing one approach.

Write a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can collaborate with the school's student health team to support a student in Upper Secondary with depression, and provide 5 collaboration strategies.
Create a 150-word text on how to promote inclusion for a student in [grade 2] with language difficulties, and write 4 strategies to facilitate communication with classmates.
Write a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can support a student in [grade 7] with an intellectual disability in an inclusive class, and provide 5 adaptations for instruction.
Create a list of 5 ways to promote peer support in the classroom for a student in [grade 4] with physical disabilities, and include a task where the specialist writes a plan for one activity.
Write a 150-word text on how a special education specialist can work with school staff to reduce stress for a student in Upper Secondary with ADHD, and create 4 strategies for a calmer timetable.

Create a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can build an inclusive environment for a student in [grade 1] with hearing loss, and provide 5 tips to facilitate communication in the classroom. Cognitive and Executive Functions

Write a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can support a student in [grade 5] with weak executive functions in planning their schoolwork, and provide 5 strategies to improve organisation.
Create a list of 5 activities to train working memory in a student in [grade 3] with cognitive difficulties, and include a task where the specialist writes a lesson plan for one activity.
Write a 150-word text on how to support a student in [grade 9] with ADHD in managing time and deadlines, and create 4 strategies to improve time awareness.
Create a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can work with a student in Upper Secondary who has difficulty prioritising tasks, and provide 5 tips to strengthen prioritisation skills.

Write a list of 5 exercises to practise impulse control with a student in [grade 6] with concentration difficulties, and include a task where the specialist writes a plan for implementing one exercise.
Create a 150-word text on how to use checklists to support a student in [grade 4] with weak executive functions, and write 4 examples of checklists for different subjects.
Write a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can support a student in [grade 7] with autism in developing flexible thinking, and provide 5 strategies to practise problem-solving.

Create a list of 5 apps that can support a student in Upper Secondary with cognitive difficulties in organising their schoolwork, and include a task where the specialist writes a plan for using one app.
Write a 150-word text on how to train attention in a student in [grade 2] with concentration difficulties, and create 4 activities to strengthen focus during lessons.

Create a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can support a student in [grade 8] with weak executive functions in goal-setting, and provide 5 tips for creating realistic goals. Motivation and Engagement

Write a 200-word text on how a special education specialist can increase motivation in a student in [grade 5] who often gives up when faced with setbacks, and create 5 strategies to promote persistence.
Create a list of 5 reward systems that can motivate a student in [grade 3] with low motivation for schoolwork, and include a task where the specialist writes a plan for implementing one system.
Write a 150-word plan for how a special education specialist can engage a student in [grade 9] with low self-esteem in Swedish lessons, and provide 4 tips for creating positive learning experiences.
Create a 200-word text on how to use interests to motivate a student in Upper Secondary with autism, and write 5 activities that connect the student's interests to their schoolwork.
Write a list of 5 strategies to increase engagement in a student in [grade 6] who is frequently absent, and include a task where the specialist writes a plan for implementing one strategy.

Create a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can work with a student in [grade 4] who struggles to see the purpose of schoolwork, and provide 5 tips for connecting learning to the student's everyday life.
Write a 150-word text on how to use positive reinforcement to motivate a student in [grade 2] with behavioural difficulties, and create 4 examples of positive reinforcement in the classroom.
Create a list of 5 ways to make homework more engaging for a student in [grade 7] with concentration difficulties, and include a task where the specialist writes a plan for adapting the homework.

Write a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can increase motivation in a student in Upper Secondary who feels overwhelmed by schoolwork, and provide 5 strategies to reduce performance anxiety.

Create a 150-word text on how to use play-based learning to engage a student in [grade 1] with low motivation, and write 4 examples of play-based activities for different subjects. Behaviour Support and Classroom Management

Write a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can support a student in [grade 5] who frequently disrupts lessons, and create 5 strategies to promote positive behaviour in the classroom.
Create a list of 5 techniques for managing disruptive behaviour in a student in [grade 3], and include a task where the specialist writes a plan for using one of the techniques.
Write a 150-word text on how to set clear expectations for a student in [grade 7] with ADHD, and create 4 examples of classroom rules that are easy to follow.

Create a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can support a student in Upper Secondary who frequently avoids tasks by acting out, and provide 5 strategies for managing avoidance behaviour.
Write a list of 5 strategies to reduce conflicts between a student in [grade 6] and their classmates, and include a task where the specialist writes a plan for implementing one strategy.
Create a 150-word text on how to use a behavioural analysis to understand a student in [grade 4] who frequently becomes angry, and write 4 questions to map the causes of the behaviour.

Write a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can support a student in [grade 9] with oppositional behaviour, and provide 5 strategies for building a positive relationship with the student.

Create a list of 5 ways to create a calm classroom environment for a student in [grade 2] with sensory sensitivity, and include a task where the specialist writes a plan for implementing one approach.
Write a 150-word text on how to use time-out constructively with a student in [grade 6] who displays impulsive behaviour, and create 4 steps for a time-out routine.

Create a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can support a student in Upper Secondary who frequently interrupts lessons, and provide 5 strategies to promote self-control in the classroom. Assessment and Follow-Up
Write a 200-word text on how a special education specialist can evaluate the effect of an adaptation for a student in [grade 5] with dyslexia, and create 5 questions to measure progress in reading.
Create a list of 5 methods for documenting a student's development in [grade 3] with autism, and include a task where the specialist writes a documentation template.

Write a 150-word plan for how a special education specialist can follow up on a student in [grade 9] with concentration difficulties after an intervention, and provide 4 strategies for adjusting the intervention if needed.
Create a 200-word text on how to use student self-assessment to measure progress in a student in Upper Secondary with low self-esteem, and write 5 self-assessment questions.
Write a list of 5 ways to gather feedback from teachers about a student in [grade 6] with behavioural difficulties, and include a task where the specialist writes a survey for the teachers.

Create a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can evaluate a student in [grade 4] with social difficulties after an intervention to promote peer relationships, and provide 5 evaluation criteria.
Write a 150-word text on how to use observations to follow up on a student in [grade 2] with language difficulties, and create 4 observation points for classroom interactions.
Create a list of 5 ways to measure progress in executive functions for a student in [grade 7] with ADHD, and include a task where the specialist writes a plan for following up on one function.

Write a 200-word plan for how a special education specialist can evaluate the effect of an adapted learning environment for a student in Upper Secondary with sensory sensitivity, and provide 5 indicators of improvement.
Create a 150-word text on how to involve parents in the follow-up of a student in [grade 1] with motor difficulties, and write 4 questions for discussing the student's progress with the parents.
